signals.headline: Clippers Select Swiss Rookie Yanic Konan Niederhauser at No
signals.raw:
Clippers Select Swiss Rookie Yanic Konan Niederhauser at No. 30 in 2025 NBA Draft | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Los Angeles Clippers drafted 7-foot Swiss center Yanic Konan Niederhauser, a former Penn State player averaging 12.9 points, 6.3 rebounds, and 2.3 blocks in his junior year, with the 30th pick acquired via prior trade.[2]

signals.headline: South Korea's annual CPI inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual CPI inflation rose to 2.2% YoY in March 2026 (from 2.0% in Feb, below 2.3-2.4% consensus)** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]
